jealousy – thca flower 14g jealousy click here for coa jealousy strain is a well balanced hybrid strain (50% indica 50% sativa) made by crossing two impressive strains gelato 41 and sunset sherbet. this earthy strain has exceptionally high thc levels around 28 30% and is perfect for experienced cannabis users. jealousy thca strain will bring an uplifting high that will relax you for hours. you’ll then feel creativity coming over you energizing your brain with motivation to finish any task. on the comedown you’ll feel a euphoric body high leaving you happy and maybe giggly. jealousy strain is a real standout for anyone who loves a potent well rounded high with a dash of luxury. this combo brings together the best traits of both parents delivering a smooth and flavorful experience with a bit of an edge. visually jealousy is striking. the buds are often dense and compact covered in a thick layer of glistening trichomes that give them a frosty almost diamond like appearance. you’ll notice vibrant colors too with shades of deep green purple and a touch of orange pistils that really pop. aroma wise jealousy is quite enticing. it has a rich complex scent with strong notes of sweet citrusy fruit combined with hints of earthy and pine undertones. it’s like a fresh fruity dessert with a touch of spice—inviting and intriguing. when it comes to flavor jealousy continues to impress. the taste is smooth and sweet with a fruity citrusy profile that might remind you of a sherbet or candy. there’s also a subtle earthy undertone that rounds out the flavor making each puff delicious and satisfying. as for the effects jealousy delivers a balanced high that hits both your mind and body. you’ll start with an uplifting euphoric buzz that boosts your mood and creativity perfect for socializing or diving into creative projects. as the high progresses you’ll experience a relaxing body effect that helps ease tension without making you too sleepy or couch locked. overall jealousy is a fantastic choice if you’re into strains that offer a rich flavor profile and a well rounded high. it’s great for enhancing social experiences winding down or simply enjoying a flavorful smoke. if you’re looking for something that combines sweetness with a bit of sophistication jealousy is definitely worth a try! terpene profile caryophyllene limonene myrcene 21.7% thca 3.5 grams
